allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command '\(Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''C:\\$Recycle.Bin'\\'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '\\''*README*'\\'' } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-List\) 2>&1')

PowerShell($conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=10.0.3.253;Database=TheLibrary;User Id=TheLibrary;Password=TheLibrary;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $conn.Open\(\); $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "SELECT TOP 200 RIGHT\(FullPath, CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(FullPath\)\)-1\) AS FileName FROM LocalBookFiles WHERE FullPath LIKE '%-%' ORDER BY NEWID\(\)"; $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while \($reader.Read\(\)\) { $reader[0] }; $conn.Close\(\))

PowerShell($conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection 'Server=10.0.3.253;Database=TheLibrary;User Id=TheLibrary;Password=TheLibrary;TrustServerCertificate=True;'; $conn.Open\(\); $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\); $cmd.CommandText = "WITH paths AS \(SELECT FullPath, REPLACE\(FullPath, '/', '\\'\) AS p FROM LocalBookFiles\) SELECT TOP 250 RIGHT\(p, CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(p\)\) - 1\) AS FileName FROM paths WHERE CHARINDEX\('\\', REVERSE\(p\)\) > 0 ORDER BY NEWID\(\)"; $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while \($reader.Read\(\)\) { $reader[0] }; $conn.Close\(\))
